    Method
    Description
    javafx.scene.layout.VBox
    PlaylistViewBuilder.buildSongPanel(Playlist playlist, String displayMode)
    Renders the selected playlist's info, action buttons, and its songs.

    Opens the delete confirmation dialog.
    static void
    PlaylistDialogHandler.showRenameDialog(Playlist playlist, PlaylistService playlistService, PlaylistController controller)
    Opens the rename dialog for an existing playlist.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Renders all user playlists as either a card grid or a list of rows.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Playlist>
    PlaylistService.getCurrentUserPlaylists()
    Time Complexity: O(n) where n = number of user's playlists Space Complexity: O(n)
    Optional<Playlist>
    PlaylistService.getPlaylistById(Long playlistId)
    Time Complexity: O(1) database lookup by ID Space Complexity: O(1)
